cross_pc_parity_vs_NicolaiPC.note: DolmerPC er ~2,300 tok tungere end den optimerede NicolaiPC. Ikke blokerende for onboarding, men relevant for #605 token-budget. Cuts kan adressere via connector-disable (claude.ai/settings/connectors) + plugin-disable (/plugin).
